note: First derivation from the generative map

principles.name: NADA VIENE DE NADA
principles.description: Conservation. Everything transforms, nothing is created or destroyed.
principles.shadow: Believing something will appear without input

principles.name: EL ORDEN CUESTA ENERGIA
principles.description: Entropy applied. Maintaining any structure requires continuous work.
principles.shadow: Assuming what is built maintains itself

principles.name: EFECTOS SIGUEN CAUSAS CON RETRASO
principles.description: The delay is where opportunity and danger live.
principles.shadow: Expecting immediate results or failing to connect cause with effect due to the interval

principles.name: FUERZAS CONSTANTES PEQUENAS DOMINAN GRANDES ESPORADICAS
principles.description: Compounding. Applies to money, skills, relationships, and distortions.
principles.shadow: Underestimating the incremental. Overvaluing the single blow.

principles.name: SISTEMAS DESPLAZADOS GENERAN FUERZA DE RETORNO
principles.description: Homeostasis. Applies to markets, bodies, cultures, relationships.

principles.name: MAYORIA DE EFECTOS VIENEN DE POCAS CAUSAS
principles.description: Power law (80/20). Unequal distribution is the norm, not the exception.

principles.name: EXTREMOS REVIERTEN HACIA EL PROMEDIO
principles.description: Regression to the mean. Good streaks and bad streaks are temporary.

principles.name: CONEXIONES ESCALAN MAS RAPIDO QUE NODOS
principles.description: Network effect. System value grows exponentially with connections.

principles.name: ALGUNAS TRANSFORMACIONES SON IRREVERSIBLES
principles.description: Arrow of time. Not everything can be undone.
principles.shadow: Acting as if everything is reversible (or freezing as if nothing is)
